pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly queries the unique_identifier 'DM-TRIAL-2024'.
Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly sets DM-102 and DM-105 to status_id 1, and verifier.py which checks that their status is changed (status != 1).
Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly sets DM-104 to status_id 5, and verifier.py which checks that its status is restored (status == 1).
Verified via verifier.py which penalizes if the status of DM-101 or DM-103 is modified from status_id 1.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated subject data injected via PostgreSQL setup scripts for study DM-TRIAL-2024. Subjects DM-102 and DM-105 are initially set to status_id 1 (active) and must be removed (status != 1). Subject DM-104 is initially set to status_id 5 (removed) and must be restored to status_id 1. Control subjects DM-101 and DM-103 are active and their status must remain unchanged.
